prompt: A minimalist, hand-drawn comic panel rendered in thick, bold, slightly wobbly black marker lines on a pure white background, mimicking a quick sketch on a whiteboard. There are zero gray tones or shading, only stark black and white. The main character is a simplified, stick-figure style white fox with black outlines, large pointed ears, and a bushy tail. The fox is sitting at a desk typing on a laptop with a concentrated expression, wearing tiny round glasses. On the laptop screen there are multiple slash commands floating out: /compact, /diff, /batch. In the upper-center area of the image, leaving space above, there is a rough rectangular orange (#FF6600) banner containing handwritten, thick black marker lines Chinese characters that clearly say "隐藏技能". A small speech bubble next to the fox contains handwritten, thick black marker lines text that clearly says "/hack".
